arts.ttl: Arsenal legend Thierry Henry sends two-word message as major decision confirmed
arts.sum: The 47-year-old last posted in March 2021 but has now returned to the social media platform. Until this changes, I will be disabling my accounts across all social platforms.

arts.ttl: João Neves Reveals Why PSG Project Won Him Over Despite Man Utd Summer Links
arts.sum: João Neves was a hot commodity this past summer transfer window as Manchester United and Paris Saint-Germain were the clubs linked to the former SL Benfica standout. The Portuguese standout made a name for himself last season, garnering the attention of several clubs. arts.ttl: Video: Gianluigi Donnarumma’s Second Mistake on Bukayo Saka Goal Sparks Arsenal Dominance
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma made another mistake in the contest against Arsenal on Tuesday night at Emirates Stadium. After failing to snag the ball when he came off his line, the Italian whiffed on the second goal scored by Bukayo Saka. arts.ttl: Video: Gianluigi Donnarumma’s Costly Mistake Allows Kai Havertz to Fire Arsenal Ahead
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma has made another mistake in a big-time UEFA Champions League match. Arsenal opened up the scoring with a header goal from Kai Havertz to hand the home side a 1-0 advantage. While the German gets credit for the goal, Donnarumma had a hand in the Gunners taking the lead. arts.ttl: Who is Josh Robinson? Arsenal wonderkid named on bench for PSG Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arteta has youth and experience in his Arsenal squad against PSG, with Robinson the latest Hale End graduate to be given an opportunity to rise from the U21s. Josh Robinson has been named in the Arsenal senior squad for the very first time ahead of their Champions League game against Paris Saint-Germain on Tuesday night .

arts.ttl: Havertz delights Arsenal fans with Chelsea dig
arts.sum: Kai Havertz feels that winning the Champions League with Arsenal 'would mean a lot more' than with Chelsea . Ahead of Arsenal's Champions League clash with PSG, Havertz spoke about what it would mean to win his second European trophy.

arts.ttl: Gabby Logan is forced to apologise just minutes into Amazon Prime's coverage of Arsenal vs PSG due to major blunder
arts.sum: Amazon Prime Video host Gabby Logan was forced to apologise just minutes into the broadcaster coverage of Arsenal vs PSG Champions League clash.
Mikel Merino makes his first appearance on the bench as Arsenal host PSG without Ousmane Dembélé.

arts.ttl: Gasperini: “Shakhtar Donetsk may not be Arsenal, but they’re still a valuable team”
arts.sum: Atalanta manager Gian Piero Gasperini spoke to the media ahead of his team’s UEFA Champions League match against Shakhtar Donetsk. The Italian coach expressed confidence in his squad’s form following the international break, despite a recent loss to Como. “We’ve started well after the transfer window closed,” Gasperini stated. “We had that defeat against Como, but the team put in a good performance in Bologna.
